title: After $6.25 bn 'gift' to 'Trump Accounts', Michael & Susan Dell donate $750 m
content: Michael and Susan Dell have pledged $750 million to the University of Texas at Austin for a new medical center and research campus. This significant donation will focus on integrating AI and advanced computing to improve patient care, research, and education. The project, expected to open by 2030, aims to enhance Austin's healthcare capabilities and advance medical innovation.

title: 'We are installing tracking software in your machines': Meta to US employees
content: Meta is installing new tracking software on US employees' computers to capture mouse movements, clicks, and keystrokes for AI training. This initiative aims to improve AI agents' ability to perform work tasks autonomously, like using shortcuts. Meta assures employees the data won't be used for performance reviews, only for enhancing AI models.

title: Thanks SIR, Tamil Nadu records 85% polling
content: Polling this time was the highest in the state’s electoral history, with 4.85 crore of the 5.73 crore on the electoral rolls casting their votes.

title: Anupam Kher chose renting over owning after selling home to Alia
content: Veteran actor Anupam Kher has never shied away from speaking about his humble beginnings, and his recent revelations about selling his Mumbai apartment reflect the same philosophy. The actor, who once sold a property later purchased by Alia Bhatt, has now opened up about why he consciously chose not to own a house at one point in his life.

title: Microsoft announces first voluntary buyout in its 51-year history for over 8,000 US employees
content: Microsoft is initiating its first-ever voluntary employee buyout program, offering retirement to approximately 7% of its U.S. workforce. This move, announced via memo, targets employees whose age and years of service total 70 or more, excluding some senior roles. The company is also adjusting stock reward distribution and simplifying manager review processes.

title: Gabrielle Union: 'I can’t afford to pay' for family as she splits bills 50/50
content: ​Dwyane Wade, the NBA legend, lives a relatively luxurious life with his wife, renowned actress Gabrielle Union, and their daughter now, as they remain private. While Dwyane Wade and Gabrielle Union have gone public with how they have always equally divided expenses between themselves, the actress has opened up about how difficult it has been with her father being in memory care.

title: Russini’s husband faces scrutiny over claims he knew of alleged Vrabel affair
content: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, and the former New York Times’ reporter and NFL insider, Dianna Russini, continue to dominate headlines as their alleged affair rumors swirl. As Dianna Russini has stepped down from her role at The Athletic, new allegations have been made about her marital life that she has always tried to keep out of the spotlight.

title: Final Instagram post of Brazilian triathlete Mara Araujo resurfaces after death
content: Brazilian triathlete Mara Flavia Araujo died during the swimming leg of the Ironman Texas triathlon on April 19, 2026. Her last Instagram post, shared hours earlier, has gone viral after her death. Reports from Chosun.com and Yahoo confirm she went missing during the swim. A close friend revealed she was unwell before the race but still chose to compete.

title: 'He fathered her child': Claims about Russini’s son spark new Vrabel saga twist
content: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, has publicly announced that he is taking some time off to seek counselling as the alleged affair rumors with Dianna Russini refuse to die down as new details emerge. Amid all the mess, it seems the situation has taken a turn for the worse as Dianna Russini’s husband and child have been dragged into the drama.

title: Python in a podcast: Raj Shamani’s figuring out features invasive guest as he brings live snake
content: Raj Shamani's podcast featured a live Burmese python, offering a unique lesson on wildlife. Wildlife explorer Paul Rosolie demonstrated the snake's incredible biology and immense strength, highlighting its defensive nature. The segment underscored how fear often stems from misunderstanding, as the python reacted only when stressed, proving a powerful, memorable demonstration of animal behavior.

title: Vrabel’s 'she’s been through a lot' remark sparks concern amid Russini rumors
content: Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s alleged affair rumors have refused to die down even after the two of them have strongly denied having an inappropriate relationship with each other. As Mike Vrabel has broken his silence now, his controversial remark about his wife, Jennifer Vrabel, has now sparked concern about his marriage to her even as his wife remains out of the spotlight.

title: NFL trade rumor: Commanders eye $120M 49ers star for Daniels boost
content: The Washington Commanders recorded a brutal run on the field in the last season as the team managed to win just 5 games while losing in 12 in 2025. This was a major decline since the 2024 season, when the Washington Commanders recorded 12 wins and 5 losses. With Jayden Daniels sustaining major injuries, it seems the team is focused on fixing its roster ahead of the new season.

title: NHL rumor: Blackhawks eye Rielly, Knies in Leafs trade talks
content: The Chicago Blackhawks are reportedly showing strong interest in acquiring Toronto Maple Leafs' young talents Matthew Knies and defenseman Morgan Rielly. This speculation follows the Maple Leafs' GM firing and a disappointing season, with Chicago looking to rebuild with high-impact young players. While Knies is considered largely unavailable, Rielly's contract and fit are being considered.

title: After Dhurandhar success, Rakesh Bedi gets Rs 1 cr bonus after impressing in Ranveer's franchise
content: Veteran actor Rakesh Bedi is reaping the rewards of the blockbuster success of Aditya Dhar's Dhurandhar (2025) and Dhurandhar The Revenge (2026), starring Ranveer Singh. Known for his impeccable comic timing and vast body of work, the actor has witnessed a fresh surge in popularity with the franchise. It has now emerged that the makers went a step further to reward him for his standout performance.

title: Horoscope today: Daily astrological predictions for April 24, 2026
content: Horoscope Today: Read daily horoscope predictions for April 24, 2026. Know all about the astrological events and influences that will be affecting each of the 12 zodiac signs. Our astrologer has analyzed the movements of the planets and the alignment of the stars to bring you the most accurate and up-to-date horoscope predictions for the day ahead. Get ready to discover what the stars have in store for you today.

title: 'Smacks of ulterior motives': Congress to EC on notice to Kharge
content: The Congress has submitted a preliminary response to the Election Commission's notice concerning party president Mallikarjun Kharge's "terrorist" remark. The party alleges the notice, citing discrepancies and a rushed deadline, indicates ulterior motives and a lack of due diligence. They have requested a week to provide a detailed reply and seek an audience with the EC.

title: 'Uninformed, in poor taste': India slams Donald Trump over 'hell hole' remark
content: India has labeled US President Donald Trump's "hell hole" remark on the country as "uninformed" and "inappropriate." The MEA spokesperson stated the comments do not reflect the reality of the strong India-US relationship, which is built on mutual respect and shared interests. Trump had reshared a post on Truth Social using derogatory terms for India and China.

title: Why Shardul Thakur comes to bat even after MI used Danish as impact sub - Explained
content: Interestingly, Shardul Thakur was not part of the Mumbai's starting XI and even not the impact player. Mumbai had already used opener Danish Malewar as its impact player in place of Allah Ghazanfar.

title: Trump's 'Gold Card' visa: One cleared, hundreds await as $1 million residency plan rolls out
content: The Trump administration's 'Gold Card' visa program, offering US residency for a $1 million fee, has approved only one applicant to date. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick stated hundreds more are under review, with all applicants undergoing extensive vetting and paying a $15,000 processing fee. The initiative aims to attract wealthy and skilled individuals to the US.

title: Bhooth Bangla BO: Akshay Kumar starrer marches towards Rs 100 crore in week 1
content: 'Bhooth Bangla', directed by Priyadarshan and starring Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh Rawal, Wamiqa Gabbi, Rajpal Yadav, Mithila Palkar and Asrani, is closing in on the Rs. 100 crore India net milestone as it completes its first week in theatres. With a cumulative India net of Rs. 79.02 crore and a worldwide gross of Rs. 127.37 crore after seven days, the U/A certified horror-comedy has delivered a strong opening week despite competing against 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' in its fifth week and a full IPL 2026 season. Marking Akshay Kumar and Priyadarshan's reunion after 16 years, the 145-minute supernatural thriller follows Arjun Acharya confronting the demonic entity Vadhusur in his ancestral home in Mangalpur, featuring a nostalgic ensemble of Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav and the late Asrani.

title: Why are CSK players wearing black armbands vs MI in IPL 2026 match?
content: CSK players were wearing black armbands due to CSK pacer Mukesh Choudhary’s mother passing away on Tuesday after a year-long battle with illness.

title: SRK’s manager Pooja Dadlani buys 3 Bandra flats for Rs 38.21 crore
content: Pooja Dadlani, long-time manager of Shah Rukh Khan, along with her husband Hitesh Prakash Gurnani and father Mohan Seoram Dadlani, has invested in three apartments in Mumbai’s Bandra area, with the total transaction value pegged at Rs 38.21 crore. The investment has been structured across the family, with Pooja Dadlani, her husband, and her father purchasing one apartment each.

title: Aryna Sabalenka Net Worth: Earnings, prize money, endorsements explored
content: Tennis sensation Aryna Sabalenka boasts an impressive net worth of $22 million, fueled by over $34 million in career prize money. Her dominance on the WTA Tour, including major wins in 2024 and 2025, coupled with lucrative endorsements from brands like Nike and Audemars Piguet, solidify her status as a top earner in women's tennis.

title: Sanju Samson scripts history vs MI in IPL, becomes only CSK batter to...
content: Sanju Samson completed his century on the last ball of the innings with a four off Krish Bhagat's bowl. That was his second century of the season, his second for CSK and his fifth in the IPL history.

title: 'Naughty or nice?' Trump ranks Nato allies over support in Iran war
content: The White House has reportedly created a 'naughty and nice' list for Nato allies, ranking them on contributions and support during the Iran war. This initiative aims to pressure nations that did not align with US positions, potentially impacting future military cooperation and strategic support.

title: The optics deficit: Will missing Stalin-Rahul ‘brotherhood’ hurt alliance in Tamil Nadu?
content: The absence of joint rallies between Rahul Gandhi and alliance partners like MK Stalin in Tamil Nadu raises concerns about Congress's coalition strategy. This visual gap fuels speculation and opposition attacks, contrasting with proactive alliance building seen from other INDIA bloc leaders like Arvind Kejriwal.

title: Telangana RTC strike | A transport system stuck in breakdown mode
content: Six years after a prolonged shutdown in 2019, an indefinite strike by Telangana State Road Transport Corporation employees has once again brought the State’s public transport system to a halt, leaving nearly 65 lakh commuters stranded. Unresolved demands, especially the absorption of 40,000 employees into government service, and a widening trust deficit between workers and the government have resurfaced. While the government has shown willingness for talks while terming the strike illegal, deeper structural issues such as an ageing fleet and rising operational strain continue to plague the corporation, reports Syed Mohammed

title: Pahalgam, a year on: Resilience falters, tourism struggles
content: After the initial shock and grief of the April 2025 terrorist attack that killed 26 unarmed men on south Kashmir’s Baisaran meadow, Peerzada Ashiq finds that locals grapple with an uncertain future. Tourism is low, livelihoods have been lost, and heightened security measures are in place

title: State may witness close contests in many constituencies
content: The presence of TVK founder Vijay is said to have turned the contest into a three-cornered one instead of the usual bipolar race, paving the way for closer electoral battles than in the past

title: 19-year-old worker kills newborn minutes after delivery in factory toilet in Bengaluru
content: According to the police, the woman delivered a premature male baby after a seven‑month pregnancy and allegedly slit the newborn’s throat and disposed of the body

title: Congress questions EC notice to Kharge, alleges ulterior motives
content: The party objects to 24-hour deadline given to Mallikarjun Kharge to respond, describing it as insufficient given his ongoing election campaign engagements

title: A season to try and understand the people’s pulse
content: While journalists cannot ignore digital platforms, only field reporting offers a clear understanding of the public sentiment

title: Recent hits give Malayalam film industry a shot in the arm
content: A couple of young and talented filmmakers have scripted success in the Malayalam film industry through their recent ventures. G. Krishnakumar finds out how the youngsters have rekindled hope in the industry that has been struggling to stay afloat

title: Troubled waters: A.P., T.N. fishermen embroiled in a row
content: The seizure of four mechanised boats owned by Tamil Nadu fishermen at Juvvaladinne Fishing Harbour in Nellore district by local fisherfolk has prompted the Andhra Pradesh government to reinitiate boat patrolling across four coastal districts, bringing to the fore yet again a four-decade-old issue of illegal intrusion. The conflict takes a political turn and the repercussions are witnessed in 164 A.P. villages, narrates N. S. Chowdary

title: Kerala fireworks tragedy: body parts found as search intensifies
content: Cadaver dogs aid recovery of body parts; over 300 kg of unexploded explosives collected as probe deepens

title: NOTA loses ground as electors in Tamil Nadu lean towards new political alternatives
content: In 2013, the Supreme Court directed the Election Commission of India to include NOTA as an option on electronic voting machines, allowing voters to formally reject all candidates

title: Lisa Gill appointed Chief Justice of A.P. High Court
content: She will assume office on April 25 consequent upon the retirement of current Chief Justice Dhiraj Singh Thakur on April 24

title: Record turnout in WB & Tamil Nadu polls despite violence
content: Record voter turnout marked Phase 1 of the 2026 Assembly elections in West Bengal and Tamil Nadu, despite sporadic violence and polling disruptions.

title: Residents near Katpadi boycott polls after relocation of polling booth
content: Citing relocation of the booth to a farther distance from the colony and a lack of civic amenities in the area, residents chose not to vote

title: Polling booth agent arrested for damaging EVM in Tiruvannamalai
content: The damaged EVM was replaced with another machine to continue polling, which was delayed by around 15 minutes

title: France waives airport transit visa requirement for Indians
content: The move follows French President Emmanuel Macron’s announcement during his visit to India in February 2026 that he would take measures to ease travel for Indians via France

title: Pandalam family member criticises Kerala for stance in Sabarimala entry dispute
content: Senior representative of erstwhile royal family criticises government in Supreme Court for not being firm in opposing petitions filed by non-believers questioning the age-old rituals of Sabarimala temple

title: Over 88 per cent polling in Vellore, nearby districts
content: Election officials said that among four districts, Tiruvannamalai registered the highest polling percentage with 88.98%, followed by Tirupattur (88.62%), Vellore (88.61%), and Ranipet (88.04%) as on 8.30 p.m on Thursday

title: Trump shares right-wing anchor’s rant against Indians, MEA terms it ‘inappropriate’
content: The MEA response came after Opposition members and former diplomats criticised the government for not offering a stronger response to the U.S.

title: NHRC issues notices to Centre, States over poor adoption of NCERT, SCERT textbooks in private schools
content: A complaint received by the NHRC had alleged that substitution of textbooks published by the NCERT or the SCERT with private materials translates to heavy financial burden on families and violates NEP norms

title: Bombay HC pulls up NIA for delays in 2006 Malegaon blast investigation
content: The Division Bench observed that the Special Judge under the National Investigation Agency (NIA) Act had not applied judicial mind to the materials placed before the court and had considered evidence that is not admissible in law to frame charges

title: Nepal’s customs duty is the outcome of a ‘pre-existing provision’, will not affect ‘household goods’: India
content: The rule makes it mandatory for travellers carrying goods worth more than one hundred Nepali rupee (NPR) to pay customs duty on the goods. It is aimed at protecting traders in border towns who complain that visitors do not buy things from them as they enter the country after buying things from the Indian side of the border

title: Analysis: Why there is a ‘Pawar play’ over political legacy in Baramati
content: Aspirations of the younger generation of the Pawar family, the BJP’s efforts to make in-roads, and the dilemma of the NCP and NCP (SP) cadre raise questions about the future of the Pawar bastion

title: Nirmala Sitharaman urges bankers to brace for AI threats amid concerns over Anthropic's Mythos
content: During the meeting, the finance minister urged the Indian Banks’ Association (IBA) to develop a coordinated institutional mechanism to respond swiftly and effectively to any such threats

title: Naidu directs officials to develop Amaravati into revenue-generating growth hub
content: Chairing the 60th meeting of Andhra Pradesh Capital Region Development Authority, the Chief Minister emphasises that the capital’s infrastructure should reflect Telugu culture while featuring iconic, high-rise structures

title: Book release controversy: SSUS to initiate inquiry
content: The release of Sri Tirthapada Puranam, a biography of Chattampi Swamikal published by the varsity, was reportedly cancelled at the last minute after it was found that only four volumes had been printed, while the other bound volumes kept in a box were blank

title: Relief as West Bengal sees bonhomie amid bitter political rivalry
content: Trinamool and BJP candidates at Kharagpur Sadar shake hands, while BJP candidate in Taldangra constituency touches the feet of his rival Trinamool nominee

title: Watch: Above 92% turnout in Bengal, 85% in Tamil Nadu amid poll violence | Above the Fold | 23.04.2026
content: In today’s episode, we look at the key election trends in Tamil Nadu and West Bengal, tracking major shifts ahead of polling. We also cover the political row in the United States over birthright citizenship, rising tensions in West Asia around the Strait of Hormuz, and a significant change in West Bengal’s campaign landscape, and more

title: West Bengal Elections 2026 highlights: First phase of polling complete; estimated voter turnout crosses 92%
content: Phase 1 polling which saw 'highest ever' turnout saw isolated incidents of violence in several pockets

title: West Bengal polls: Modi and Mamata spar over jhaal muri
content: After voting for the first phase of Assembly polls in West Bengal, the campaign has picked up for the final phase on April 29

title: Tamil Nadu elections 2026 highlights: Over 85% voter turnout in State for the first time since Independence
content: Limited bus services affect polling day travel; robots dressed in 'dhavanis' (half-sarees) welcome and assist voters in several booths across the State; several young voters show up in colour-coded outfits, purportedly in support of TVK

title: Tamil Nadu elections 2026: Over 84% voter turnout in the State, highest in its electoral history
content: Chief Election Commissioner Gyanesh Kumar said that it was the highest percentage of polling in West Bengal and Tamil Nadu. “[The] ECI salutes each voter of West Bengal and Tamil Nadu,” he said

title: West Bengal election 2026: Record turnout of over 92% in first phase amidst isolated incidents of violence
content: Before the 2026 elections, the highest turnout was recorded in 2011 when 84.33% voters exercised their franchise; the elections in 2011 saw Trinamool Congress defeating the 34-year Left Front government

title: Kerala on the brink of heatwave, Chief Minister calls for ‘self-lockdown’
content: IMD Director says though heatwave has not been technically declared, the hot and humid conditions are at times comparable to heatwave. Intense heat, coupled with high humidity, is likely to persist at least till April 27

title: Congress Govt on back foot as Telangana RTC strike paralyses services, exposes gaps in crisis management
content: The situation escalated sharply with a series of distressing incidents involving RTC staff, intensifying public anger and political pressure

title: 2 Giants, 20 Scientists: Mysterious Deaths, Disappearances Rattle US, China
content: In Washington, at least 11 incidents involving scientists in areas such as nuclear technology, space research and advanced weapons are under scrutiny.

title: Millions Of Americans May Now Also Be Considered Canadian Under New Law
content: Since the new law took effect December 15, immigration lawyers in the United States and Canada say they have been overwhelmed by clients seeking help submitting proof of citizenship applications.

title: Delhi Murder Autopsy Reveals Ex-Help's Brutality, Woman's Fight To Save Life
content: The woman was raped and murdered on Wednesday morning in Delhi, allegedly by her family's former domestic help.

title: Teen Killed Over Old Instagram Post In Ahmedabad, 3 Arrested
content: The three accused allegedly stabbed the victim Mohammed Salik Imtiyaz Hussain Sheikh to death on Wednesday night.

title: Trump To Meet Lebanon, Israel Envoys During Peace Talks
content: With Trump struggling to push Iran into a deal on the wider regional war, the United States is hoping for progress on Lebanon, which Israel has pounded in response to Hezbollah fire.

title: Mojtaba Injured, A 'Board' Of Generals Helps Take The Calls In Iran
content: The president and his cabinet have largely been tasked with maintaining internal stability, ensuring consistent supplies of essentials like food and fuel, and keeping day-to-day governance running smoothly, according to officials familiar with the si

title: West Bengal Elections 1st Phase Voting Highlights | Bengal Sees Highest-Ever Voter Turnout At 92.59%
content: West Bengal Assembly Elections 2026 Phase 1 Voting LIVE Updates: Around 3.6 crore voters in 152 of the state's 294 constituencies are expected to vote today.

title: West Bengal, Tamil Nadu Elections 2026 Highlights: Highest-Ever Voter Turnout In West Bengal, Tamil Nadu
content: West Bengal, Tamil Nadu Election Voting 2026 LIVE Updates: Around 3.6 crore voters in 152 of Bengal's 294 constituencies across 16 districts are expected to vote in the first phase today.

title: Meta To Layoff 10% Workforce Amid Heavy AI Investments: Report
content: Meta will lay off about 8,000 employees and leave thousands of other positions next month, a source told AFP.

title: 'Enticement, Intimidation By Trinamool': Adhir Chowdhury On Women's Turnout
content: "The Trinamool has both enticed and intimidated female voters, warning them that if they did not vote for the party, the 'Lakshmir Bhandar' scheme would be discontinued," said Adhir Ranjan Chowdhury

title: Delhi Civic Body Begins Mapping Delhi Homes Being Used As Shops, Offices
content: The focus is on how land-use rules are being implemented on the ground in rapidly growing urban areas.

content: US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: The standoff between the US and Iran has effectively choked off nearly all exports through the strait -- where 20 per cent of the world's traded oil passes in peacetime -- with no end in sight.

title: Ladakh's 'Him Sarovar' Plan To Tackle Water Crisis As Glaciers Shrink
content: Under 'Project Him Sarovar', launched on April 10, the Ladakh administration is now attempting to capture and store that water for year-round use

content: Sitharaman urged all banks to take all necessary pre-emptive measures to secure their IT systems and safeguard customer data.

title: Microsoft Offers Voluntary Retirement To 8,750 Employees In US
content: About 7% of the US workforce will be eligible for the buyouts, according to a person familiar with the planning. Microsoft has never previously done buyouts of this scale, said the person, who requested anonymity to discuss an internal matter.

title: IndiGo Gets Regulator's Warning Over Airfare Cap Compliance
content: The aviation regulator has advised the airline to exercise due caution and ensure strict adherence to applicable government orders in the future.

title: India In Touch With Family Of Ex-Naval Officer Detained In Qatar
content: Ministry of External Affairs Spokesperson Randhir Jaiswal said that multiple proceedings involving Commander Purnendu Tiwari should not be conflated.

title: Indian Navy lists Hormuz as ‘primary area’ of interest, one of the key ‘choke points’
content: Maritime choke points in the Indian Ocean Region (IOR) constitute critical nodes that exert disproportionate influence over global trade and energy security . such choke points are Cape of Good Hope, Mozambique Channel, Bab-el-Mandeb, Suez Canal, Strait of Hormuz, Malacca and Singapore Straits, Sunda Strait, Lombok Strait and Ombai Strait .

title: Space dominance key to future warfare, says CDS; DRDO chief urges whole-of-nation push
content: general anil Chauhan said if we fail in space, we will be forced to fight blind . he said, 'technology is no longer just an enabler. it's reshaping the very calculus of power' in this emerging paradigm, space is no more a support function .

title: Ladakh LG announces tourism reforms for ‘ease of doing business’
content: government of ladakh announces major reforms to deregulate hospitality sector . a unified category under the nomenclature 'travel agent' has been introduced . the registration validity of tour operators has been increased from one year to five years .

title: Setback for forces as NaVIC goes down to 3 sats; ex-IAF chief calls desi navigation system a 'failure'
content: NavIC is designed to run effectively with a constellation of seven satellites . a minimum of four satellites is required for accurate 3D position, navigation, and timing (PNT) services . number of fully functional navigation satellites in space has dropped to three .

title: Judiciary can’t interfere in devotees’ sacrosanct right to manner of worship, says Supreme Court
content: the supreme court agreed that devotees’ right to decide the mode and manner of worshipping God was non-justiciable . the remark came after senior advocate J Muth Raj’s argument that in Hinduism, every village had a ‘gram devta’ and every family had ‘ishta devtes’ . it was impossible for the court to examine the essentiality of such practices while tracing it to the umbrella religion .

title: Co-produce with India nich technologies like radar, sensor AI-enabled UAVs: Rajnath to German cos
content: defence minister said german companies are keen to engage with german companies for co-development and co-production in areas . he stressed the need to forge partnerships based on reliability and shared interests, terming them indispensable in current shifts in geopolitical alignments and disruptions in supply chains .

title: 'There's reason why women offer namaz at home,' says SC judge
content: justice amanullah said there was no ban on women offering namaz in mosques since the days of the Prophet . there were customs and procedures in Islam regulating how can they offer prayer . the nine-judge bench must overrule the 1994 SC judgment in Ismail Farooqui case .
